mapper.select: select p.purchase_id, p.purchased_user, p.purchased_date, p.destination, p.cancel, pd.purchase_detail_id, pd.item_id, pd.amount, i.item_id, i.name, i.manufacturer, i.category_id, i.color, i.price, i.stock, i.recommended from public.purchases p inner join public.purchase_details pd on p.purchase_id = pd.purchase_id inner join public.items i on pd.item_id = i.item_id where p.purchase_id = #{purchaseId} order by p.purchase_id, pd.purchase_detail_id

select p.purchase_id, p.purchased_user, p.purchased_date, p.destination, p.cancel, pd.purchase_detail_id, pd.item_id, pd.amount, i.item_id, i.name, i.manufacturer, i.category_id, i.color, i.price, i.stock, i.recommended from public.purchases p inner join public.purchase_details pd on p.purchase_id = pd.purchase_id inner join public.items i on pd.item_id = i.item_id where p.purchased_user = #{purchasedUser} order by p.purchase_id, pd.purchase_detail_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO public.purchases( purchased_user, purchased_date, destination, cancel) VALUES ( #{purchasedUser}, #{purchasedDate}, #{destination}, #{cancel})
